sections.paragraph:
μιαίνω [etym. complex] in Hellenic linguistic history μ. in the sense of discoloration, whether by artistry or otherwise, applies to a broad range of physical entities and also extends to non-physical conditions in a restricted pejorative sense, stain, contaminate, pollute, defile

—a. of cultic pollution J 18:28.

—b. of moral pollution Tit 1:15; Hb 12:15; Jd 8.
